Class MembresiaService

Namespace
BLL.Services
Assembly
BLL.dll

Business logic service for membership plan management.

public class MembresiaService

Constructors

MembresiaService()

Initializes dependencies from DalFactory singletons.

public MembresiaService()

Methods

ActualizarMembresia(MembresiaDTO)

Updates an existing membership plan. The numeric code may be changed only if it is not already in use by another plan.

public void ActualizarMembresia(MembresiaDTO dto)

Parameters

dto MembresiaDTO

Updated membership data. Id must identify an existing record.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the membership does not exist or the new code conflicts with another plan.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown if the plan does not exist or the code conflicts with another plan.

CrearMembresia(MembresiaDTO)

Creates a new membership plan.

public void CrearMembresia(MembresiaDTO dto)

Parameters

dto MembresiaDTO

Membership data. Codigo must be unique.

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown for invalid price, regularidad, or missing name.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the numeric code is already in use.

DeshabilitarMembresia(Guid)

Disables a membership plan by setting Activa = false. Blocked when at least one active client is still subscribed to this plan.

public void DeshabilitarMembresia(Guid id)

Parameters

id Guid

The membership to disable.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the membership does not exist or has active subscribers.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown if the plan has active subscribers.

ListarMembresias(bool)

Returns all membership plans, optionally restricted to active ones.

public List<MembresiaDTO> ListarMembresias(bool soloActivas)

Parameters

soloActivas bool

When true, returns only plans with Activa = true; when false, returns all plans including disabled ones.

Returns

List<MembresiaDTO>

ObtenerMembresia(Guid)

Retrieves a single membership plan by primary key.

public MembresiaDTO ObtenerMembresia(Guid id)

Parameters

id Guid

The membership identifier.

Returns

MembresiaDTO

The MembresiaDTO, or null if not found.
